title: Playgrounds, parks, and other facilities
doc_html:
§3087.125.  Playgrounds, parks, and other facilities

The board of commissioners shall have the power to cause to be created and constructed playgrounds, picnic grounds, grounds for recreation, parks, and any and all other facilities to accommodate the public and to provide adequate access to the lake, as may within the opinion of the board become necessary.

Acts 1999, No. 588, §1.
